## ✅ Stepper Component Added

### New files created (4)

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `apps/v4/registry/bases/base/ui/stepper.tsx` | Base variant — uses `@base-ui/react` patterns, `IconPlaceholder`, `cn-*` class prefixes |
| `apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/ui/stepper.tsx` | New York v4 variant — uses `lucide-react` (`Check` icon), standard Tailwind classes |
| `apps/v4/registry/bases/base/examples/stepper-example.tsx` | Five examples: Horizontal, Horizontal+Content, Vertical, Vertical+Content, With Disabled |
| `apps/v4/registry/new-york-v4/examples/stepper-demo.tsx` | Interactive 3-step horizontal wizard demo |

### Registry entries added (4)

| Registry file | Entry added |
|---|---|
| `bases/base/ui/_registry.ts` | `stepper` (between `spinner` and `switch`) |
| `bases/base/examples/_registry.ts` | `stepper-example` (between `spinner-example` and `switch-example`) |
| `new-york-v4/ui/_registry.ts` | `stepper` with `lucide-react` dependency |
| `new-york-v4/examples/_registry.ts` | `stepper-demo` (between `spinner-item` and `switch-demo`) |

---

### Component API

The `Stepper` compound component exposes **10 sub-components** and **2 hooks**:

```tsx
// Compound components
<Stepper value={step} onValueChange={setStep} orientation="horizontal|vertical">
  <StepperList>
    <StepperItem value="step-1" completed={false} disabled={false}>
      <StepperTrigger>
        <StepperIndicator>1</StepperIndicator>   {/* auto ✓ when completed */}
        <StepperHeader>
          <StepperTitle>Account</StepperTitle>
          <StepperDescription>Create your account</StepperDescription>
        </StepperHeader>
      </StepperTrigger>
    </StepperItem>
    <StepperSeparator />                          {/* auto-adapts to orientation */}
    <StepperItem value="step-2"> … </StepperItem>
  </StepperList>

  <StepperContent value="step-1">Step 1 panel</StepperContent>
  <StepperContent value="step-2">Step 2 panel</StepperContent>
</Stepper>

// Context hooks (for custom sub-components)
const { value, orientation, onValueChange } = useStepper()
const { isActive, isCompleted, isDisabled } = useStepperItem()
```

**Key design decisions:**
- **Controlled & uncontrolled** modes both supported via `value`/`defaultValue`
- **`StepperIndicator`** automatically shows a checkmark icon when `completed={true}`, otherwise renders its `children` (the step number)
- **`StepperSeparator`** reads `orientation` from context and renders as a horizontal line (`h-px flex-1`) or vertical line (`w-px h-6`) automatically
- **`StepperContent`** accepts a `value` prop and only mounts when the active step matches — no hidden/show toggling, full unmount for clean state
- All sub-components expose `data-slot`, `data-state`, `data-orientation`, and `data-completed` attributes for CSS targeting
